inline_comments: Check if value looks like a WhatsApp user target (e.g. "41796666864:0@s.whatsapp.net" or "123@lid").
Extract the phone number from a WhatsApp user JID. "41796666864:0@s.whatsapp.net" -> "41796666864" "123456@lid" -> "123456"
If the caller passed a JID-ish string that we don't understand, fail fast.
Otherwise normalizeE164 would happily treat "group:120@g.us" as a phone number.

functions.name: isWhatsAppUserTarget
functions.doc: Check if value looks like a WhatsApp user target (e.g. "41796666864:0.whatsapp.net" or "123").

functions.name: extractUserJidPhone
functions.doc: Extract the phone number from a WhatsApp user JID.   "41796666864:0.whatsapp.net" -> "41796666864"   "123456" -> "123456
